default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss HeyGen's content strategy, SEO performance, and resource allocation for tool pages and API-related content.](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Impressions and clicks are growing, with a lag in click growth due to recent bulk blog post launch](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Focus on high-leverage keywords; low-volume API content to be self-served via AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Tool pages showing positive CTR and position trends; strategy to improve includes metadata refinement, step-by-step guides, and FAQs](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Resource constraints for custom design assets; team to repurpose existing content from Sonny, Aria, and community](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Impressions and clicks trending upward](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [100 blog posts launched in 4 weeks, causing impression spike](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Click growth lagging as new content climbs rankings](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Tool pages avg 2.2 CTR since Jan 1; last 7 days show CTR and avg position improvements](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)

### API Content Strategy

  - [Low-volume API use case content to be self-served via AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Focus on 3 main buckets: making a video, translating a video, real-time video experience](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Team to prioritize higher-leverage items with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

### Tool Pages Optimization

  - [Competitor analysis reveals opportunities:](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
      - [Step-by-step guides (e.g., vid.io's approach)](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [Embedded videos featuring multiple tools](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [FAQ sections for keyword inclusion](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Team to launch more pages with existing assets](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Repurpose content from Sonny (gifs) and Aria (in-depth videos)](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)

### Resource Allocation

  - [Design team focused on rebranding; limited capacity for new assets](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Strategy: Repurpose existing content, use programmatic creation](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Leverage community-created how-to guides and gifts](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Use existing icon library; optimize for speed over custom icons](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Mariana to develop editorial content with long-tail keyword variations](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Team to access Sonny's folder for gifs and leverage Aria's videos](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [Consider including sizzle videos in relevant tool pages](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana to analyze keyword clusters for high-utility content focus](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Team to repurpose existing design assets for new tool pages](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [Implement FAQ sections in tool page template (connect Mariana with GrowthOps)](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Revisit step-by-step guide implementation, considering image requirements](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Explore options for acquiring more platform images for tool pages](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Begin revamping high-traffic tool pages, one per week](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [Await Sanity migration for faster template updates](https://fathom.video/share/9WKt2g1N_7s-TyqYRuTKUYLy_zbmQ7UM?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

action_items.description: Review new set of use cases from Kathy
Check w/ Jimmy re: 2 different templates for tools pages
Add more keywords to tools pages, incl. AI video translator variations
Develop editorial content for AI video translation keywords
Access/review GIFs/content from Sonny/Aria for tools pages
Provide access to Aria's videos for tools pages
Tag Allison/Sunny for how-to guides & product GIFs
Repurpose existing icons for new tools pages
Connect w/ Growth Natives Fish to create tools page template w/ FAQ section
